<!--
  Thanks for contributing to BIM! Please fill in the checklist below so
  reviewers can land your change quickly.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? One or two sentences is enough. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Fixes #456, Related to #789 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] My commit messages follow the Conventional Commits style (`feat(scope): ...`, `fix(scope): ...`, `chore: ...`, `docs: ...`).
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally.
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally.
- [ ] If this PR changes any `packages/*` library, I have rebuilt them (`npm run build:libs`) before running API tests — API tests import from each lib's compiled `dist/`, not from source.
- [ ] I have updated documentation (README / ARCHITECTURE / inline comments) if user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] I have not introduced any secrets, credentials, or personal data into tracked files.

## Screenshots / demo

<!-- For frontend changes, add before/after screenshots or a short screen recording. -->

## Additional notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, alternatives considered, follow-ups. -->
